title: You Can See Me?
overview: The accidental magical girl.

title: Yes, It`s a Swimsuit. This Is Not a Mistake
overview: Yuzuka attempts magic and Miton tries to survive.

title: Hey, You and Me Are Friends, Right?
overview: A new girl appears!

title: Magical Girls Have a Retirement Age
overview: Chiya wants to become a magical girl herself, but it might not be that easy. Meanwhile, Yuzuka tempts Miton with food...

title: I Don`t Like the Fact That I Transform into a Swimsuit
overview: Yuzuka transforms into a magical girl with a swimsuit, but what will she do when she doesn't want anyone to see her like that...

title: Is Employee Labor Even Tougher Than Magical Girl Battles?
overview: Yuzuka wants her dad to meet Miton. After he seems reluctant at first, wacky hijinks ensue.

title: I`d Add Them to My Collection
overview: Yuzuka invites Chiya over to help test her magical abilities, and they find out some interesting things when they test Yuzuka's transformation.

title: Another Magical Girl...
overview: Chiya finally gets to meet Daiya-chan, but how will she fair when she's so protective of Yuzuka. Yuzuka also meets a new friend.

title: There`s No Longer a Need for Magical Girls
overview: Mafuyu and Yuzuka compare magical girl outfits, and Chiya finds a new friend. But Mafuyu has a secret...

title: You`re the Perfect Woman... Ptoo!
overview: Yuzuka tries to find ways around wearing her swimsuit when something surprising happens, and Miton has a startling ability.

title: Then, Why There are Magical Girls?
overview: Yuzuka talks to her mom about being a magical girl. She has an interesting take on the whole thing, when someone else shows up...

title: I Will Become Yuzuka`s Best Friend
overview: Yuzuka is an extremely good girl, but Miton is worried that Yuzuka might not be social enough with other people at school, but Miton realizes one important truth about his relationship with her.

title: Has Anything Good Happened for You Since You Became a Magical Girl?
overview: Yuzuka is starting to get used to using water magic, but when Chiya asks her if there's any benefit to being a magical girl, she's shaken by the fact that she can't answer.

title: Having a Swimsuit Is Weird
overview: Yuzuka has improved her magic to the point where she can show everyone, but when she compares her swimsuit to Mafuyu's she can't help feeling something's off. What does Mafuyu say to Yuzuka?!

title: Magical Girl Chiya Is Here-Chiya!
overview: Everyone is surprised by Mafuyu's announcement about her retirement and her successor, and also about Chiya's sudden transformation. Once everything settles down a bit, Chiya asks Yuzuka something.

title: Would You Like to Admire and Appreciate Yuzuka with Me?
overview: Pochi's scheme allows Chiya and Yuzuka to hold a tea party under the guise of a study group session. Wanting to share her happiness, Chiya invites Mafuyu.

title: I`ll Teach You Anything You Don`t Know
overview: Mafuyu started the party, which now includes Daiya, by acting the grand senior member with experience, but now...?!

title: Because I Can`t Stay in This Outfit
overview: With the cafe air conditioning broken, Mafuyu asks Yuzuka to transform. Once it starts to cool down nicely, everyone decides to play together?!

title: I Think She Can See Too Much
overview: This episode is about Daiya-chan. Daiya was playing at the park when Yuzuka and Chiya invite her to the cafe. She has a special skill no one knows about. What could it be?!

title: You`re Asking About Me?
overview: One day, at the cafe, Yuzuka and Chiya decide to ask Miton lots of questions about himself. Miton begins telling them about his past...

title: I Will Work! For My Family!!
overview: This episode is about Yuzuka's dad. Yuzuka's dad, looking completely exhausted, loosens his tie. As he looks up at the beautiful colors of the sunrise sky... he is enveloped by light?!

title: The... Beach?
overview: At Daiya-chan's invitation, everyone decides to go to the beach. Chiya and Mafuyu try a lot of different things to help Yuzuka get used to wearing a swimsuit, some more successful than others. For a moment, everyone enjoys the romance of it, but then...

title: Chosen Ones! It`s Time for You to Join Forces and Save the Captured Princess!
overview: Daiya-chan's in a tough spot?! Noticing something seems strange, Yuzuka and Mafuyu transform!! They combine their powers to go rescue her, but...

title: Why I`m Glad I Became a Magical Girl
overview: Is Daiya-chan all right?! And what is the reason Yuzuka has found for being a magical girl?! And now, the final episode of the second season!!
